parameters.query: SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.participante, t.trivia_number, t.fecha) AS data FROM (SELECT u.name AS participante, u.document_id AS cedula, u.agent_name AS agente, u.status AS estado, l.trivia_number, l.movement_type AS tipo_movimiento, l.amount AS goles, CASE WHEN l.movement_type='multiplier_bonus' THEN (regexp_match(l.description, 'por (\d+) códigos'))[1]::int ELSE NULL END AS codigos_cargados, l.description AS descripcion, l.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota' AS fecha FROM ct_scoring_ledger l JOIN ct_users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.agent_name IS NULL OR u.agent_name != 'PRUEBAS') t

SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.total_calculado DESC) AS data FROM (SELECT u.name AS participante, u.document_id AS cedula, u.agent_name AS agente, u.status AS estado, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.movement_type='trivia_base' THEN l.amount END),0) AS goles_base, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.movement_type='speed_bonus' THEN l.amount END),0) AS goles_velocidad, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.movement_type='multiplier_bonus' THEN l.amount END),0) AS goles_multiplicador, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.movement_type='multiplier_bonus' THEN (regexp_match(l.description,'por (\d+) códigos'))[1]::int END),0) AS codigos_totales, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.movement_type='adjustment' THEN l.amount END),0) AS ajustes, COALESCE(SUM(l.amount),0) AS total_calculado, u.total_goals AS total_sistema, COALESCE(SUM(l.amount),0) - u.total_goals AS diferencia FROM ct_users u LEFT JOIN ct_scoring_ledger l ON u.user_id = l.user_id WHERE u.agent_name IS NULL OR u.agent_name != 'PRUEBAS' GROUP BY u.user_id, u.name, u.document_id, u.agent_name, u.status, u.total_goals) t

SELECT json_agg(t) AS data FROM (SELECT 'Todos los participantes (activos + inactivos)' AS concepto, COALESCE(SUM(total_goals),0) AS goles FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name IS NULL OR agent_name != 'PRUEBAS' UNION ALL SELECT 'Solo participantes activos (debe coincidir con KPI Goles Acumulados del Dashboard)' AS concepto, COALESCE(SUM(total_goals),0) AS goles FROM ct_users WHERE status='active' AND (agent_name IS NULL OR agent_name != 'PRUEBAS') UNION ALL SELECT 'Solo participantes inactivos (historial conservado, no se muestra en el Dashboard)' AS concepto, COALESCE(SUM(total_goals),0) AS goles FROM ct_users WHERE status='inactive' AND (agent_name IS NULL OR agent_name != 'PRUEBAS')) t
